v1.0

App Version v1.0
🚪
Logout
Terms & Conditions 📋

Raahat – Niyam aur Shart

Update: March 2025

Raahat ek safe platform hai depression aur mental stress se guzar rahe logon ke liye.

1. Privacy

  • Phone number 100% masked rahega.
  • Diary sirf aapke liye private hai.
  • Anonymous posts mein identity nahi batai jaegi.
  • Data Firebase secure servers par.

2. Community Niyam

  • Hurt karne wali baat post mat karo.
  • Violence, hate speech bilkul nahi.
  • Sorry Share sirf apni baat ke liye hai.
  • Dusron ki privacy ka samman karo.

3. Chat Rules

  • Mood match chat sirf same mood ke logon se hogi.
  • Inappropriate messages se account ban hoga.
  • Besties sirf 2 rakh sakte ho ek baar mein.

4. Loyalty Tick 🤞

  • Jo users 1 saal tak wohi 2 besties rakhte hain unhe milta hai.

5. Mental Health

Raahat emotional support hai, professional advice nahi. Serious problems mein doctor se milein.

Raahat mein aapka swagat hai 💙
